name: Baked Cranberry-Apple Dumplings (1 of 2)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cranberries, washed and stems removed
1 Vanilla ice cream or whipped topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Roll out pastry dough and line a pie dish.
3. Place apples in the pie dish and dot with butter.
4. In a bowl, mix egg yolk with cinnamon and sugar, then pour over the apples.
5. Fold the pastry around each apple, sealing the edges.
6. In another bowl, combine cranberries, remaining sugar, syrup (if using), and optional chopped apple.
7. Place dumplings in the pie dish, spooning some sauce on top of each one.
8. Cover with more pastry, seal the edges, and cut slits to vent steam.
9. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until golden brown and apples are tender.
10. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped topping.
